name: Stone
description: A common solid block found underground. Mined fastest with a pickaxe. Drops cobblestone unless mined with Silk Touch.

name: Cobblestone
description: Dropped when mining stone without Silk Touch. Used for tools, furnaces, and building.

name: Iron Ore
description: Iron ore is found underground, usually between Y=-64 and Y=72. It requires a stone pickaxe or better. Smelt it in a furnace to get iron ingots.

name: Gold Ore
description: Gold ore is found underground around Y=-16 and abundantly in Badlands. Requires an iron pickaxe or better. Smelt to get gold ingots.

name: Diamond Ore
description: Diamond ore is found deep underground, most commonly around Y=-59. It requires an iron pickaxe or better. Drops diamonds when mined.

name: Coal Ore
description: Coal ore is common underground and in mountains. Mined with any pickaxe. Drops coal for torches and fuel.

name: Redstone Ore
description: Redstone ore is found deep underground. Requires an iron pickaxe or better. Drops redstone dust for circuits.

name: Lapis Lazuli Ore
description: Lapis ore is found underground. Requires a stone pickaxe or better. Drops lapis lazuli, used for enchanting and blue dye.

name: Copper Ore
description: Copper ore generates in larger ore blobs underground. Requires a stone pickaxe or better. Smelt into copper ingots.

name: Emerald Ore
description: Emerald ore is found in mountain biomes. Requires an iron pickaxe or better. Drops emeralds for trading.

name: Obsidian
description: Obsidian is created when water touches a lava source block. It requires a diamond or netherite pickaxe to mine. Used for nether portals and enchanting tables.

name: Crafting Table
description: A crafting table expands the player's crafting grid to 3x3, allowing more complex recipes. Crafted from 4 wooden planks.

name: Furnace
description: A furnace smelts ores and cooks food. Crafted from 8 cobblestone in a ring. Requires fuel such as coal or wood.

name: Chest
description: A chest stores up to 27 item stacks. Crafted from 8 wooden planks in a ring. Two chests placed side by side form a double chest.

name: Torch
description: Torches provide light and prevent hostile mob spawning in a small radius. Crafted from coal or charcoal above a stick.

name: Oak Log
description: Oak logs are obtained from oak trees. Break with an axe or by hand. Craft into planks or use as building material.

name: Bedrock
description: Bedrock is an unbreakable block found at the bottom of the world and on top of the Nether. Cannot be mined in survival.

name: Spawner
description: Monster spawners spawn mobs when a player is nearby. Found in dungeons, mineshafts, strongholds, and Nether fortresses.

name: Netherrack
description: Netherrack is the most common block in the Nether. It breaks quickly and burns indefinitely if ignited.

name: End Stone
description: End stone makes up most of the End islands. It is found in the End dimension. Requires a pickaxe to mine.
